rows.label: tev024101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Caroline about the
residential district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Caroline if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Caroline about the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Caroline if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Caroline about damage
suffered during the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Caroline about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_SEL0081
rows.name:
Ask Caroline if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Most of the homes in the
residential district are being
shared by multiple people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0002
rows.name:
For the most part, people are having to live with folks
they'd never met before we landed here on Mira. It's a
tough situation, but this is no time to complain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I just hope they finish building
NLA soon. Oh, and that the plan
includes apartments and such.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0008
rows.name:
I've heard that you BLADEs each have
your own room in the BLADE Home, and
that you can even keep cats as pets![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0009
rows.name: Gotta say, I'm super jealous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0010
rows.name:
One of my housemates hates pets, so even
though I want a cat, I can't get one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Maaaan, I just want to curl up with a
kitty until everything's better again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Look at how much of the district has
ended up in the shadow of the Ma-non
ship. Don't you think that's a bit much?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0021
rows.name:
We brought these plants all the way here
from Earth, and now I worry they're going
to die from a lack of sunlight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0022
rows.name:
And I doubt having to spend EVERY moment
of EVERY day under a shadow is very good
for our psychological well-being![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Do you think maybe we could
counteract that if we went
sunbathing on top of the Ma-non ship?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0027
rows.name:
The houses in this area were made in an
old-fashioned, brick-and-mortar kind of
way, so they're pretty tough to remodel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0028
rows.name:
I really envy how much easier that sort
of thing is down at the BLADE Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0029
rows.name:
You just punch some buttons on a
terminal and make the walls and
ceiling any color you want, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0030
rows.name:
...What? You have to be certified
as a BLADE before they let you
change your room around?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Huh. That doesn't make a lot of sense to
me, but I guess you just gotta suck it
up and do it. Now go get 'em, champ![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I worried that all the plants
would wither and die while we
were evacuating the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0037
rows.name:
But there really wasn't much damage
to the residential district at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0038
rows.name:
That's a relief. You can always
rebuild a house, but when a plant's
dead, it's never coming back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0039
rows.name:
And all these plants were brought
here from Earth, so if they get wiped
out, they're basically extinct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0045
rows.name:
Hey, you're [ST:playername ], aren't you? I can't believe
I'm talking to someone so famous![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0046
rows.name:
Are you planning to leave the
Home and buy a home out here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0047
rows.name:
If you do, I'd be happy to
take care of your yard![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0048
rows.name:
After all, as a BLADE, you wouldn't be home
all that often, right? And it would break
my heart to see all your plants dry out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0052
rows.name:
I like taking care of other people's yards, but I
wish I had a yard of my own I could design the way
I like. Too bad real estate costs so much...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0053
rows.name:
Hmm... Maybe instead of living in
NLA, I could help settle a new town
in White Woods or Nightglow Forest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0054
rows.name:
It wouldn't need to be some giant thing—just
a small town amidst nature like the ones back
on Earth. Yeah, that would be perfect![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024101_MSG0055
rows.name:
I should go to BLADE HQ and
see if they have any plans
to do something like that.[ST:wait ]
